name: Seasonal Farm & Pumpkin Patch
description: A whole season of families streaming through with cash in hand — a natural impulse buy on the way out.
benefit: A whole season of families streaming through with cash in hand. A sealed-pack machine in the farm market or by the exit is the easy impulse buy on the way out — and it earns through every weekend of the rush.

name: Shopping Mall
description: Steady all-day foot traffic and shoppers already in spending mode.
benefit: Steady foot traffic all day and shoppers already in spending mode. A sealed-pack machine on the concourse earns its few square feet without a single staff hour.

name: Public Market
description: Dense, browsing crowds in a spending mood, all day, every day.
benefit: Dense, browsing crowds in a spending mood, all day, every day. A sealed-pack machine fits right into the market floor and runs itself.

name: Beer Garden
description: Long, relaxed sessions and a crowd happy to spend.
benefit: Long, relaxed sessions and a crowd happy to spend. A card machine becomes a conversation piece and a second reason to stick around — earning from a corner you weren't using.

name: Brewery & Taproom
description: Taprooms full of regulars with time on their hands.
benefit: Taprooms full of regulars with time on their hands. A sealed-pack machine adds a little fun and a steady trickle of revenue from a corner you weren't using.

name: Bar & Pub
description: Neighborhood regulars who linger — a card machine is a talker and a draw.
benefit: Neighborhood regulars who linger over a drink. A card machine is a talker and a draw, and it earns from a few square feet by the door.
